creator: markj@FreeBSD.org
text: I think the problem has to do with struct file.  Linux has a structure by the same name, so we do some hacky "#define file linux_file" in a bunch of LinuxKPI headers, but the CTF info still has definitions for both FreeBSD and LinuxKPI struct files.  Then we end up with multiple definitions of structures which embed them, such as struct drm_syncobj.
